title: ectasis demissa
side_effects: Ectasis demissa can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing nausea, dizziness, and headaches in some individuals. Prolonged exposure to its extracts has been linked to kidney damage, liver inflammation, and an increased risk of seizures. Additionally, improper dosages can disrupt the body's natural balance, leading to irregular heartbeat, fatigue, and changes in blood pressure. In severe cases, misuse of the ectasis demissa plant can cause respiratory failure and even death.
